blocks.body: Past Simple Passive is used to describe completed actions in the past in the passive state. Formula: was/were + V3.

{ "title": "8. Short summary", "items": [ "Past Simple Passive: was/were + V3.", "Вибір be: I/He/She/It + singular → was, You/We/They + plural → were.", "Objection: was/were + not + V3 (wasn't/weren't).", "Question: Was/Were + Subject + V3?", "Used for completed actions in the past.", "Time markers: yesterday, last week, ago, in + year." ] }
